notes: v1.2.39: Fixed updater console output (removed stdout/stderr redirection), added periodic update check every 5 minutes. v1.2.38: Removed QApplication.processEvents() and hide/show cycle from _do_capture — these were causing the dialog's exec() to return prematurely. v1.2.37: DISABLED global hotkeys (pynput) — they interfere with Qt modal dialogs. v1.2.36: Added logging to ImageDialog accept/reject/closeEvent.
